description_long: This is a large, heavily armored main battle tank with a low, angular profile and a prominent main cannon mounted on a rotating turret. The vehicle features thick, sloped armor plating covering the entire body, with additional modular panels along the sides and turret for enhanced protection. The tank is equipped with multiple visible weapon mounts, including a large-caliber main gun and a secondary machine gun on the turret roof. Various hatches, periscopes, and storage compartments are distributed across the upper surfaces, and the rear section includes exhaust vents and additional stowage. The exterior is finished in a weathered, light tan and gray camouflage pattern, with subtle streaks and wear indicating operational use. The vehicle moves on wide, reinforced metal tracks, suitable for traversing rough urban and off-road environments.
description: A heavily armored main battle tank with a large turret, main cannon, and secondary machine gun, finished in a weathered tan and gray camouflage. The vehicle features thick, sloped armor and reinforced metal tracks.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sloped glacis plate, main cannon, and turret details, with visible hatches and periscopes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the length of the tank, side armor panels, and the full length of the main gun.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the engine exhaust, rear stowage, and the back of the turret with additional equipment.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the secondary machine gun on the turret roof, side armor, and track details.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large-caliber main cannon on the turret front, one machine gun mount on the turret roof, and possible secondary mounts on the turret sides.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped armor plating; additional modular and reinforced panels on the sides and turret; visually robust and designed for high protection.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Weathered tan and gray camouflage with irregular, blended patches and streaks.
